note: Market-cap source used for current market capitalization and the S&P 500 top-275 snapshot context.

title: Apoquel for Pet Owners
note: Product page supporting Apoquel's indication, safety context, and role as a canine allergic-itch and atopic-dermatitis treatment.

title: Trust Apoquel
note: Veterinary-facing product page describing Apoquel's mechanism, dosing, safety information, and canine dermatology positioning.

title: Simparica Trio for Pet Owners
note: Product page supporting Simparica Trio's monthly chew positioning, prescription status, parasite indications, safety information, and broad protection claims.

title: OpenVPMS
note: Open-source veterinary practice-management software reference for clinic-owned records, reminders, and workflow alternatives.

title: The OpenVPMS Open Source Project on Open Hub
note: Secondary open-source project listing describing OpenVPMS as a web-based veterinary practice-management system with customer, patient, workflow, inventory, reminder, and reporting features.

title: VetCompass
note: Veterinary evidence-network reference showing how large-scale practice records can support companion-animal health research and data exploration.

title: Companion Animal Parasite Council Parasite Prevalence Maps
note: Parasite prevalence mapping reference for location-aware parasite-risk protocols and brand-neutral prevention concepts.

title: Therapeutics Data Commons
note: Open therapeutic-science resource with AI-ready datasets, benchmarks, data functions, leaderboards, and an open Python library for drug-discovery and development tasks.

title: RDKit: Open-Source Cheminformatics Software
note: Open-source cheminformatics toolkit reference for computational molecule handling in speculative open veterinary drug-discovery concepts.

title: Open Babel - The Chemistry Toolbox
note: Open, collaborative chemical-data toolkit used as an enabling primitive for molecule conversion, search, analysis, and open discovery workflows.
